economic_notes: OCN has numerous GBEs including Pasikwak Business Development Corporation Ltd., Neso Corporation Ltd. (o/a The Pas I.G.A.), Otineka Development Corporation Ltd., 2239330 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a Kikiwak Inn), 5140790 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a OCN Shell), 1101501 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a Sports Traders), Aseneskak Casino, Pinesew Energy Limited Partnership, Pasikwak Limited Partnership, 8008151 Manitoba Ltd., Pasikwak NAC Investment Limited Partnership, 6792575 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a OCN Smart Farm). Also includes OCN Blizzard Junior A Hockey Club and Opaskwayak Cree Nation VLT Centre.
notes: Financial statements are consolidated and include OCN Operating Fund, OCN Housing Authority Ltd., Rod McGillivary Memorial Care Home, Opaskwayak Educational Authority Inc., OCN Land Tax, OCN Health Authority, Nakow Mining and Supply Ltd. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include Pasikwak Business Development Corporation, Neso Corporation, Otineka Development Corporation, Aseneskak Casino, Pinesew Energy Limited Partnership, Pasikwak Limited Partnership, and others. Aseneskak Casino included using a March 31, 2020 year end. Some subsidiaries use December 31, 2019 year end. OCN Blizzard Junior Hockey Club uses May 31, 2019 year end. OCN VLT Centre uses March 31, 2020. The text extracted contains many CID-encoded characters making precise number extraction uncertain. Fiscal year appears to be year ended March 31, 2020.
